name: englang
description: EngLang editor tooling with diagnostics, hover, completion, and run commands.

englang.runtimePath.description: Path to eng.exe. Leave empty to use the bundled executable, workspace executable, or PATH.

englang.lspPath.description: Path to eng-lsp.exe. Leave empty to use the bundled executable, workspace executable, or PATH.

enumDescriptions: Stable CLI diagnostics for opened and saved files.
Editor-service snapshot diagnostics aligned with hover and completion metadata.
englang.diagnosticsBackend.description: Diagnostics source for the Problems panel. Use eng-cli for stable file diagnostics, or lsp-snapshot to try the editor-service snapshot path.

enumDescriptions: Run declared effects and write the standard review artifacts.
Reject workflows with explicit write, export, process, file, or DB mutation effects.
Require reproducibility metadata for sampling, network, and cache boundaries.
englang.executionProfile.description: Execution profile used by EngLang: Run Current File. normal runs declared effects; safe rejects side effects; repro requires reproducibility metadata for sampling, network, and cache boundaries.

englang.lintOnSave.description: Run EngLang diagnostics when .eng files are opened or saved.

englang.lintOnChange.description: Update EngLang diagnostics for unsaved .eng buffers after a short typing pause using eng-lsp.exe.

englang.semanticHighlighting.enabled.description: Use eng-lsp snapshot semantic tokens for role-aware highlighting of variables, units, quantities, side effects, reports, validations, and workflow boundaries.

commands.title: EngLang: Open Current File Review JSON
EngLang: Open Current File Review Panel
EngLang: Open Last Run Review JSON
